### Client-side temporal join algorithm

```
patients_cancer  = { p.subject for p in Query1 }
treatments       = { p.subject → min(p.date) for p in Query2 }  # first treatment per patient
dre_by_patient   = { p.subject → [p.date] for p in Query3 }     # all DREs per patient

final_cohort = {
  pt for pt in patients_cancer ∩ treatments.keys() ∩ dre_by_patient.keys()
  if any(
    treatments[pt] - 180 days ≤ dre_date < treatments[pt]
    for dre_date in dre_by_patient[pt]
  )
}
```
